role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal market conditions, the fund will invest substantially all of its assets in FLexible EXchange Options that reference the price performance of the Invesco QQQ TrustSM?, Series 1. FLEX Options are customized equity or index option contracts that trade on an exchange but provide investors with the ability to customize key contract terms like exercise prices, styles and expiration dates. The fund is non-diversified.
